Uses of Enum
org.apache.commons.codec.CodecPolicy

Packages that use CodecPolicy
Package
Description
org.apache.commons.codec
Interfaces and classes used by the various implementations in the sub-packages.
org.apache.commons.codec.binary
Base64, Base32, Base16, BaseN, Binary, and Hexadecimal String encoding and decoding.
org.apache.commons.codec.net
Network related encoding and decoding.

    Constructors in org.apache.commons.codec.binary with parameters of type CodecPolicy
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    Base16(boolean lowerCase, CodecPolicy decodingPolicy)
    Deprecated.
    Use Base16.builder() and Base16.Builder.
     
    Base16InputStream(InputStream inputStream, boolean encode, boolean lowerCase, CodecPolicy decodingPolicy)
    Deprecated.
     
    Base16OutputStream(OutputStream outputStream, boolean encode, boolean lowerCase, CodecPolicy decodingPolicy)
    Deprecated.
    Use Base16OutputStream.builder() and Base16OutputStream.Builder.
     
    Base32(int lineLength, byte[] lineSeparator, boolean useHex, byte padding, CodecPolicy decodingPolicy)
    Deprecated.
    Use Base32.builder() and Base32.Builder.
     
    Base32InputStream(InputStream inputStream, boolean encode, int lineLength, byte[] lineSeparator, CodecPolicy decodingPolicy)
    Deprecated.
    Use Base32InputStream.builder() and Base32InputStream.Builder.
     
    Base32OutputStream(OutputStream outputStream, boolean encode, int lineLength, byte[] lineSeparator, CodecPolicy decodingPolicy)
    Deprecated.
    Use Base32OutputStream.builder() and Base32OutputStream.Builder.
     
    Base64(int lineLength, byte[] lineSeparator, boolean urlSafe, CodecPolicy decodingPolicy)
    Deprecated.
    Use Base64.builder() and Base64.Builder.
     
    Base64InputStream(InputStream inputStream, boolean encode, int lineLength, byte[] lineSeparator, CodecPolicy decodingPolicy)
    Deprecated.
    Use Base64InputStream.builder() and Base64InputStream.Builder.
     
    Base64OutputStream(OutputStream outputStream, boolean encode, int lineLength, byte[] lineSeparator, CodecPolicy decodingPolicy)
    Deprecated.
    Use Base64OutputStream.builder() and Base64OutputStream.Builder.
    protected
    BaseNCodec(int unencodedBlockSize, int encodedBlockSize, int lineLength, int chunkSeparatorLength, byte pad, CodecPolicy decodingPolicy)
    Deprecated.
    Use BaseNCodec(AbstractBuilder).
